cards.description: The list of flashcards generated from the course content.

id.description: A unique identifier for the flashcard (e.g., 'card-1', 'card-2'). Must be unique within the set.

question.description: The front of the flashcard. A clear, concise question or prompt derived from the course content.

answer.description: The back of the flashcard. The correct and complete answer to the question. Can include brief explanations.
